productName: Fireline Cannabis Infused 2pk 0.5g (S) Platinum Blue Dream
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Blue Dream and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of berry, blueberry, and sweet, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
